instructions:
Create macOS TerminalAdapter implementation. YOU MUST USE file_write() TOOL CALLS. Format: file_write("path", """content""")

Create these files:
1. internal/terminal/macos/adapter.go - TerminalAdapter interface implementation
2. internal/terminal/macos/adapter_test.go - Tests

Key requirements:
- Implement Name(), Available(), ListSessions(), Capture(), Subscribe(), GetDimensions()
- Use CGO bindings from Task 2.5 (macos.IsAccessibilityEnabled(), GetTerminalWindowTitles(), etc.)
- Integrate with Detector from internal/terminal/detector.go
- Use build tags: //go:build darwin

Read spec at docs/tasks/2.6-spec.md for details.
